llm_revision_example.description: Opt-in only. Move these fields into render_loop when you intentionally want a bounded director/LLM directive revision pass after deterministic retry support.

outline: 1. NARRATOR opens a tiny audio smoke scene. 2. SYSTEM issues a render-loop notice. 3. HERO confirms the segment is intentionally short.
script: <NARRATOR>This is a short local render loop smoke.</NARRATOR><SYSTEM>RENDER LOOP NOTICE: validate, render, measure, and stop at the configured limit.</SYSTEM><HERO>No story rewrite requested.</HERO>
